summary: Session focused on adding a `retryWithBackoff` utility function to `src/utils/shell-test-runner.ts` with exponential backoff retry logic (max 3 attempts, base delay 500ms, 2x multiplier). The task required creating the function and corresponding tests in `tests/utils/shell-test-runner.test.ts`, then running `npm test` to verify. Analysis phase was initiated to explore project structure and understand existing code patterns before implementation.
